summary: Multiply the Margin of Success or Failure by

mechanics.name_guess: Multiply the Margin of Success or Failure by
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 097 > items > Multiply the Margin of Success or Failure by
mechanics.excerpt: Multiply the Margin of Success or Failure by OO0 to determine how many C-bills the business earned or lost Alternatively; the player and gamemaster can devise as complicated system of finances as they wish. The level of detail is matter of taste. ARCHERY This is the weapon skill used for making attacks with all kinds of bows, from short and long bows to crossbows Additionally; Archery Skill enables characters jury-rig badly damaged bow Or build simple bow from scratch.
